Title: Annual Job Fair Organizer
Description: Assist in organizing attendee entry/exit and guiding students to the appropriate company booths.

Title: Graphic Design & Media Assistant
Description: Design banners and social media posts for the upcoming UCCD training courses and workshops.

Title: Employability Skills Training Facilitator
Description: Support instructors within the training rooms and set up technical equipment and learning materials.

Title: Technical Support & Survey Coordinator
Description: Collect feedback evaluation forms from students post-workshop and input the data into the system.

Title: Corporate Relations Welcoming Committee
Description: Welcome company representatives on campus and escort them to the designated interview halls.
